title: BranchRobustnessStudySpec
description: Specification for a M46 branch-independence study. Declares branch family, target quantities, and tolerances for a branch-robustness sweep.

description.description: Human-readable description of the study goal.

branchVariantIds.description: List of branch variant IDs to include in the sweep.

targetQuantityIds.description: Target quantity IDs to track across branch variants.

environmentId.description: Environment ID to use for all branch evaluations. Null = default toy environment.

referenceBranchVariantId.description: Reference branch variant ID for distance normalization. Null = use first variant.
